title: Marcus Makes Morning Music
synopsis: Little Marcus discovers all the wonderful sounds of a cozy Sunday morning with his family, from clapping hands to sizzling pancakes.

pages.text: Marcus wakes up on Sunday morning. The sun shines bright through his window. What sounds will he hear today?

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sits up in his crib in striped pajamas, golden sunlight streaming through bedroom window, soft morning light illuminating cozy nursery with family photos
illustration.alt: Marcus waking up in his sunny bedroom on a peaceful Sunday morning

pages.text: Clap, clap! Marcus claps his hands together. What a happy sound! Mommy claps too. Clap, clap, clap!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes clapping his hands excitedly while his mother claps along, both in cozy pajamas in sunlit living room with golden hour light, newspapers scattered on coffee table
illustration.alt: Marcus and his mother clapping hands together in their bright living room

pages.text: Pat, pat, pat! Marcus pats the soft couch cushions. Daddy pats them too. Pat, pat! Such a gentle sound.

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes patting couch cushions next to his father, both in comfortable Sunday pajamas, warm domestic scene with golden morning light filtering through windows
illustration.alt: Marcus and his father patting soft couch cushions together

pages.text: Sizzle, pop! In the kitchen, pancakes cook on the stove. Marcus listens to the happy cooking sounds. Sizzle, sizzle!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes being held safely while watching pancakes cook, family kitchen filled with golden Sunday morning light, steam rising from griddle, cozy unhurried atmosphere
illustration.alt: Marcus watching pancakes sizzle and pop on the stove in the warm kitchen

pages.text: Yum, yum! Marcus makes eating sounds as he enjoys his pancakes. His whole family says yum, yum too! What wonderful Sunday sounds!

illustration.description: Marcus with short curly hair with a fade, medium-dark brown skin, warm brown eyes sitting in his high chair eating pancakes with his diverse family around the breakfast table, everyone in pajamas, golden sunlit dining room, newspapers and syrup bottles on table, gentle morning scene
illustration.alt: Marcus and his family enjoying pancakes together at the breakfast table on Sunday morning

metadata.illustrationStyle: Sunday morning light, golden hour, family pajamas, newspapers pancakes, gentle unhurried, modern diverse family, lazy morning, sunlit rooms, warm domestic

questions.question: What sound does Marcus make with his hands?
questions.explanation: Marcus makes a clapping sound by putting his hands together - clap, clap!

questions.question: What sound do the pancakes make?
questions.explanation: The pancakes make a sizzling and popping sound as they cook on the stove.

questions.question: Who makes sounds with Marcus?
questions.explanation: Marcus's whole family joins in making sounds - they clap, pat, and say yum together!
